title: Cuneiform Tablet #0761: Ur III Letter
description: A cuneiform tablet from the Ur III period — a letter document preserved on clay.
introduction: A cuneiform tablet from the Ur III period — a letter document preserved on clay.

translation.text: Cuneiform tablet of the Ur III period. Letter document. Inscribed on clay in cuneiform script. The tablet records letter matters typical of Ur III period administrative or literary practice.
